document_info.document_type: Commercial Property policy / Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.requested_limit: Building 222340000; Contents 33432000; Business Income 59212000; Coinsurance 90%; Deductible 50000
coverages_discussed.notes: Form CP 00 10 10 12. Endorsements shown on page 10 include Ordinance Or Law Coverage, Equipment Breakdown Coverage, and Utility Services — Direct Damage. According to page 11-13, each endorsement is effective 2026-03-15.

positives: Commercial real estate portfolio focused on office, retail, and mixed-use properties in major Texas metropolitan areas.
Large insured property schedule with building, contents, and business income limits defined in the declarations.

Policy includes additional coverages such as debris removal, preservation of property, fire department service charge, pollutant cleanup and removal, increased cost of construction, and electronic data.
Policy includes endorsements for Ordinance or Law, Equipment Breakdown, and Utility Services — Direct Damage.
concerns: Coinsurance requirement is 90%, which may create a penalty if values are inadequate.
Vacancy condition applies if a building is vacant more than 60 consecutive days before loss, eliminating or reducing coverage for certain causes of loss.
Final premium is subject to audit after policy expiration based on actual premium basis and classifications.
Specific causes of loss form is referenced but not included in the provided document, so exclusions and limitations are only partially described.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code: 6512 Description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas
